## Summary

- What skill(s) were added or updated?
- Which platform(s) are targeted?

## Checklist

- [ ] `SKILL.md` exists for each new skill
- [ ] Frontmatter includes `name` and `description`
- [ ] Skill folder name matches frontmatter `name`
- [ ] Skill added to `registry/skills-index.yaml`
- [ ] Docs updated if taxonomy or contribution flow changed
